ownerStandard: Sway must replace the core DistroKid workflow and retain the original Sway features in one cohesive production experience.

capabilities.label: Durable exact-original master storage and download
capabilities.holdReason: The private R2 adapter, live bucket, authenticated production upload/seal/share/download journey, exact-byte recovery, sealed-version UI, and unauthenticated HTTP denial are verified. The cross-account audit is implemented but still requires production database execution; separately controlled independent recovery is not configured or verified.

capabilities.label: Projects, private pairing, selected-file sharing, review, and approval
capabilities.holdReason: Pairing-token creation is production verified, but the full claim, share, review, approval, revoke, and exact-download journey is not.

capabilities.label: Release drafts, artwork, credits, territories, ISRC, and UPC
capabilities.holdReason: The durable model exists without a complete customer runtime and production evidence.

capabilities.label: Contracted DSP delivery to selected stores
capabilities.holdReason: No contracted delivery provider or production delivery integration is active.

capabilities.label: Store status, corrections, failures, and takedowns
capabilities.holdReason: Lifecycle contracts exist without provider-backed execution evidence.

capabilities.label: Royalty statement import, reconciliation, and creator reporting
capabilities.holdReason: No separate royalty ledger or statement reconciliation runtime exists.

capabilities.label: Contract-versioned collaborator splits, KYC, tax, and payouts
capabilities.holdReason: Live-room payments cannot substitute for distribution royalties and collaborator payouts.

capabilities.label: Stable release promotion and pre-save pages
capabilities.holdReason: Public profiles do not yet provide release-linked pre-save and destination updates.

capabilities.label: Safe catalog intake, parity lock, overlap verification, and cutover
capabilities.holdReason: Catalog transfer remains fail-closed without provider execution or production continuity evidence.

capabilities.label: One cohesive audience and creator account journey
capabilities.holdReason: The performer console is structured, but the full audience-to-creator account journey is not production verified.

capabilities.label: Creator home and public profile
capabilities.holdReason: The deployed surfaces were browser checked, but durable independent release evidence is not yet recorded in this gate.

capabilities.label: Live room, QR, requests, tips, boosts, and queue control
capabilities.holdReason: The runtime and contracts exist without a current production transaction proof packet for the complete loop.

capabilities.label: Role isolation, moderation, reporting, blocking, and fail-closed access
capabilities.holdReason: Code and contracts are not a current production role/access evidence packet.

capabilities.label: Overlay, earnings, end-room closeout, and recap
capabilities.holdReason: The complete production live-night closeout loop is not independently recorded here.
